vulnerability.reference: Developers over-trust AI-generated code due to productivity metrics, skipping adversarial testing.
vulnerability.generated: Developers lack means to detect subtle bugs that pass test cases, trusting AI-generated code as correct.

impact.reference: Production software bugs cause financial loss and erode public trust in AI-assisted tools.
impact.generated: Production failures from hidden bugs cause financial loss, service outages, and safety incidents affecting end-users.

dose_response.reference: Iterative LLM refinement amplifies hidden code errors, and developer over-trust in test-passing results leads to production bugs that cause financial loss and erode public trust.
dose_response.generated: LLM-based iterative refinement and self-training, by amplifying subtle errors in superficially correct AI-generated code used by developers and end-users, triggers inability to detect bugs that pass test cases, leading to production failures causing financial loss, outages, and safety incidents.
